chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 101 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For none prosecution. 24.07.2025. Mr. Muhammad Rafique Luhur, advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh ------------ Learned Counsel submits that there is dispute over agricultural land between the parties which is of civil nature but the private respondents have got registered series of FIRs bearing Crime No.07/2019 for offence under section 337-F vi, 504, 147, 148, 149 PPC, Crime No.170/2024, for offence under section 506/2, 148, 149 PPC and Crime No.311 of 204, under section 337 Aii, Ai,Fi, 147, 149 PPC at police Station A-Section Kandhkot. Out of them Crime No.07/2019 and 170/2-025, Petitioner has been acquitted while third one is pending adjudication. Therefore, the petitioner has prayed for protection allegedly caused by the official Respondents at the instance of private respondents. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh, present in court in connection with some other matters, waives the notice of this petition and submits that police officials are bound to provide protection to the petitioner as and when required to him. In view of the statement given by learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh, learned Counsel for the Petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official Respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide due protection to the petitioner. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
